variants: Uliana Frolova was born in Mossgate Stead and is currently residing on Novafern Isle. She is also an active member of the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship, where she shares her passion for observational astronomy with fellow enthusiasts. Uliana's unique blend of creative invention and communal involvement makes her a notable figure in her community.
